
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''


# Description 
Describe the bug clearly.

# Expected Behavior
What should have happened?

# Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

# Screenshots
Add screenshots if available for more clarity.

# Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows/MacOS]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10]

# Additional Context
Any other info.
